original_hypothesis.title: Irreversible Vault Lock Freezes NAV Updates
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: The lockVault function in PanopticVaultAccountant is irreversible. If an incorrect pool configuration is locked, or if pools need upgrading, the vault's NAV computation is permanently frozen to the locked configuration.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: Operational mistakes happen. Providing a one-way lock without an unlock mechanism means a simple configuration error by the owner permanently bricks the vault's ability to accurately price shares.
deployment_assumptions: Owner mistakenly locks the vault with incorrect pools
Or protocol upgrades require pool changes after locking
original_hypothesis.config_evidence: lockVault() sets vaultLocked[vault] = true with no function to set it to false
preconditions: Pool configuration needs to be changed subsequently

initial_operational_evidence.suspicious_workflow: One-way state transition for critical configuration

operational_questions: Is the lock intended to be permanent to provide trust guarantees to users?
What is the operational recovery procedure if a locked pool is deprecated?
validation_requirements: Check if vault owner can simply set a new accountant contract to bypass the lock

preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_2: A pool in the configuration becomes deprecated or compromised
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_3: Owner attempts to update the pool hash but is blocked by vaultLocked
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_4: Vault NAV becomes inaccurate, halting safe fulfillments
preliminary_attack_methodology.coordination_requirements: Requires operational error or external protocol changes

potential_operational_impact.operational_disruption: Inability to update NAV calculation logic
potential_operational_impact.recovery_difficulty: Requires vault owner to deploy and set a new accountant contract

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
